slides.title: Customer experience program overview
slides.objectiveText: Identify the highest-value experience interventions, define delivery owners, and track the outcomes that will matter most over the next two quarters.
contextItems: Anchor the work on the customer journeys where leadership expects the fastest commercial impact.
Use a consistent lens for feasibility, cross-functional readiness, and strategic fit before prioritizing initiatives.
Align the steering cadence and decision forums so teams can resolve blockers quickly without losing control.
Keep a light evidence trail that supports decisions and makes trade-offs visible.
metricsItems: Track initiative delivery against the milestones needed to unlock the first wave of benefits.
Measure commercial, operational, and customer signals so the team can judge whether the changes are working.
Monitor cross-functional dependency resolution and time-to-decision to keep execution moving.
Use a short executive scorecard that highlights outcomes, blockers, and decisions required.
